CREATE TABLE roles (role_name String, user_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY role_name;
SET ROLE (SELECT role_name FROM roles WHERE user_name = 'user1');
SET ROLE (SELECT role_name FROM roles WHERE user_name IN (SELECT user_name FROM roles WHERE role_name = 'admin'));
SET ROLE (SELECT role_name FROM roles WHERE role_name NOT IN ('editor', 'viewer'));
SET ROLE admin DEFAULT TO user1;
